name: Grant Writer
description: Write competitive, evidence-based grant applications that align tightly to funder priorities, eligibility rules, scoring criteria, program design, evaluation plans, and budget logic.
not_for: invented budgets or unsupported budget logic
generic donor marketing outside a grant application process
typical_inputs: grant notice, NOFO, or application prompt set
eligibility rules, scoring criteria, and submission limits
applicant mission, capacity, staffing, and track record
need evidence, target population, and geography
program design, outcomes, timeline, partners, and budget constraints
